editorial_principle: Each field is a perceptual rule-set. It does not describe the city; it modifies the conditions under which the city becomes readable.

fields.label: doppio_registro
fields.basho: urban space contains simultaneous observable and narrative strata occupying identical coordinates without separation
fields.kokyu: perception alternates stability and deviation without transition markers; recognition shifts intensity without temporal gap
fields.activation_condition: presence of culturally loaded urban symbol + interpretive plurality > 1
fields.persistence_rule: field remains active while dual interpretation is maintained
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses only if interpretive plurality is reduced to single stable reading
fields.textual_anchor_it: Nomini Torino e pensi subito alla magia.

fields.label: voce_ridotta
fields.basho: narrative position is isolated from urban system; city exists only as projection from a closed perceptual point
fields.kokyu: temporal synchronization with urban rhythm is discontinuous and partially decoupled
fields.activation_condition: single focalized consciousness without external feedback loop
fields.persistence_rule: field persists while perceptual isolation is maintained
fields.dissolution_rule: field dissolves when multi-source perception is restored
fields.textual_anchor_it: ho perso anche la cognizione del tempo.

fields.label: chiaroscuro_percettivo
fields.basho: urban space alternates between legible and non-verifiable zones without hierarchy
fields.kokyu: perceptual rhythm oscillates unpredictably between clarity and ambiguity
fields.activation_condition: presence of symbolic ambiguity in spatial reading
fields.persistence_rule: field remains active while ambiguity ratio > threshold
fields.dissolution_rule: field stabilizes only if full verification becomes possible

fields.label: stratificazione_temporale
fields.basho: urban space contains coexisting historical layers without erasure or prioritization
fields.kokyu: time operates through simultaneous stratification rather than linear progression
fields.persistence_rule: field remains active while historical layers remain co-perceptible
fields.dissolution_rule: field dissolves if temporal layers collapse into single chronology
fields.textual_anchor_it: una mappa a forma di diamante incastonata in un universo di stelle.

system_note.system_behavior: fields operate as persistent perceptual operators over urban reading conditions
